title: Buchenroedera lanceolata
taxonomy: Buchenroedera lanceolata is a species of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Buchenroedera and the tribe Podalyrieae. This plant is native to the mountainous regions of southern Africa. Buchenroedera lanceolata is a member of the subfamily Faboideae and the order Fabales. It is also sometimes referred to as Podalyria lanceolata in some classifications.
